name: Chasing Your Tail NG
label: Chasing Your Tail NG (ArgeliusLabs)
description: Counter-surveillance WiFi/BLE device-tracking detector (Chasing Your Tail — Next Gen). Flags devices that repeatedly reappear near you over time. Distinct from the HaleHound CYD multitool.
note: HONEST STATUS: upstream ArgeliusLabs/Chasing-Your-Tail-NG is a Linux/RPi Python (Kismet-based) probe-request analyzer — it ships NO ESP32/Arduino firmware and NO release binaries, so the esptool resolver returns zero assets (on_error=source_only_empty) and this profile cannot currently flash anything (owner decision pending: repoint at a genuine ESP32 port if one exists vs relabel vs remove from the matrix). 'CYT' = Chasing Your Tail. Aligned with flash_core CytNgProfile (the equivalence oracle).
